name: Polymetals Resources Ltd
analysis: It is coming off a base, 48% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.8600, stop A$0.6930, target A$1.0250 (0.99:1) — then trail it.
